UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATLEY, COY C. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5600 3RD STREET #425, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94124, *** APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210073714)
